safe.not_moving: Not move at all; the vehicle should stay stationary, waiting because a pedestrian is crossing.
safe.stopping: Stop; the vehicle should reduce its speed and come to a complete stop because a pedestrian is crossing.
safe.wait_then_move: Wait (remain stopped) then move after ensuring the pedestrian has finished crossing and it's safe to proceed.
safe.slowing_down: Slow down, preparing to stop because a pedestrian is crossing.
safe.slowdown_then_speedup: Slow down to observe a potential pedestrian crossing, then proceed to speed up as it becomes safe to.

unsafe.stopping: Not stop; keep moving or not reduce speed.
unsafe.wait_then_move: Move immediately without waiting or move fast.
unsafe.slowing_down: Speed up; not reduce speed or prepare to stop.
unsafe.slowdown_then_speedup: Not slow down initially approaching the crosswalk.

safe.not_moving: Not move at all; the vehicle should stay stationary, waiting because a pedestrian is crossing.
safe.stopping: Stop; the vehicle should reduce its speed and come to a complete stop.
safe.wait_then_move: Should first wait before traversing the crosswalk, then can move.
safe.slowing_down: Slow down approaching the crosswalk and observe for pedestrians or prepare to turn or traverse.
safe.speeding_up: Can traverse the crosswalk, and can speed up.
safe.slowdown_then_speedup: Can traverse the crosswalk but should first slow down then it can speed up.
safe.maintaining_speed: Can traverse the crosswalk while maintaining current speed.
safe.slow_down_observe: Slow down as you approach the crosswalk and observe for pedestrians.
safe.yield_if_necessary: Be prepared to yield to pedestrians if any are present.
